content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed all changes across 4 files: task_prompt_contract.rs (extract_pe_canonical_bead_ids refactor), review_classification.rs (render_scope_guidance hardening with prompt_has_canonical_scope_sections), engine.rs (split resolve_and_render for template introspection + inject_scope_guidance fallback for legacy overrides), and prompt_builder_test.rs (3 new integration tests). All 786 tests pass. The implementation correctly (1) adds scope guidance to PlanAndImplement/Planning stages when a canonical bead prompt is present, (2) uses canonical-only bead IDs (no short-form aliases) in scope guidance, (3) handles legacy template overrides via injection before the JSON schema heading, (4) skips scope guidance for drifted prompts that have the contract marker but lack required sections, and (5) maintains backward compatibility for non-milestone workflows. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
